seo.title: Bakso Geh Bandung | Indonesian Meatball Soup
seo.description: Hot Indonesian meatball soup in Ciumbuleuit, Bandung. Tendon, chili-filled, cheese-filled, egg-filled, classic, and fried options.
seo.keywords: indonesian meatball soup bandung, bakso bandung, bakso ciumbuleuit, meatball soup bandung, fried meatballs bandung

business.name: Bakso Geh
business.description: Indonesian meatball soup with hot beef broth, filled meatballs, and fried sides.
business.tagline: Hot bowls, rich broth, fair prices.

hero.headline: Hot bowls, rich broth, fair prices.
hero.subheadline: Tendon meatballs, chili-filled bakso, cheese-filled bowls, and fried sides.

galleryImages.alt: A bowl of Indonesian meatball soup

menu.name: Tendon Meatball Soup
menu.desc: Beef tendon meatballs with vermicelli, greens, and clear beef broth.

menu.name: Chili-Filled Meatball Soup
menu.desc: Bakso stuffed with bird's eye chili, served in hot beef broth.

menu.name: Cheese-Filled Meatball Soup
menu.desc: Cheese-filled bakso in a lighter beef broth.

menu.name: Egg-Filled Meatball Soup
menu.desc: Bakso filled with egg, served with vermicelli and fried shallots.

menu.name: Classic Meatball Soup
menu.desc: Smooth beef meatballs in clear, savory broth.

menu.name: Fried Meatballs
menu.desc: Crisp fried bakso with sambal on the side.

resources.title: Dine-in & takeaway
resources.description: Eat here or pack it to go.

disclaimer.seoDescription: Disclaimer for Bakso Geh, a portfolio website concept created by Coding Geh.
disclaimer.title: Bakso Geh is a portfolio concept.
disclaimer.intro: This page presents Bakso Geh as a sample bakso website, not as a live restaurant business.
items: The brand, menu, prices, and location are sample content for design and front-end presentation.
No orders, payments, or active restaurant services are processed through this website.
For client work or website development, use the official Coding Geh contact details below.
